Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3001/agents" | python3 -c "
import json, sys, urllib.request

agents = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for a in agents:
    old_name = a['name']
    new_name = old_name.replace\('Agent', ''\).strip\(\)
    if old_name != new_name:
        url = f'http://localhost:3001/agents/{a[\\"id\\"]}'
        data = json.dumps\({'name': new_name}\).encode\(\)
        req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PUT'\)
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
                print\(f'Updated: {old_name} -> {new_name}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'Error updating {old_name}: {e}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import urllib.request

# Get all agents
req = urllib.request.Request\("http://localhost:3001/agents"\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
    agents = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)

for a in agents:
    old_name = a['name']
    new_name = old_name.replace\('Agent', ''\).strip\(\)
    if old_name != new_name:
        url = f'http://localhost:3001/agents/{a["id"]}'
        data = json.dumps\({'name': new_name}\).encode\(\)
        put_req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PUT'\)
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen\(put_req\) as r:
                print\(f'Updated: {old_name} -> {new_name}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'Error updating {old_name}: {e}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import urllib.request

# Get all agents
req = urllib.request.Request\("http://localhost:3001/agents"\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
    agents = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)

# Mapping of current name to original name
revert_map = {
    'YilinG': 'YilinG Agent',
    '方案设计': '方案设计Agent',
    '器件建库': '器件建库Agent',
    '原理图设计': '原理图设计Agent',
    'Layout设计': 'Layout设计Agent',
    'Router设计': 'Router设计Agent',
    '可制造检查': '可制造检查Agent',
    '文档提取': '文档提取Agent',
    '器件优选': '器件优选Agent',
    '智能采购': '智能采购Agent',
}

for a in agents:
    old_name = a['name']
    if old_name in revert_map:
        new_name = revert_map[old_name]
        url = f'http://localhost:3001/agents/{a["id"]}'
        data = json.dumps\({'name': new_name}\).encode\(\)
        put_req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PUT'\)
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen\(put_req\) as r:
                print\(f'Reverted: {old_name} -> {new_name}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'Error reverting {old_name}: {e}'\)
EOF)

import json

# Update menus order - put dashboard before home

    {"key": "dashboard", "title": "数据看板", "path": "/admin/dashboard", "icon": "DataAnalysis", "id": "dash01"},

    {"key": "articles", "title": "文章管理", "path": "/admin/articles", "icon": "Document", "id": "c74b"},
    {"key": "navigation", "title": "导航管理", "path": "/admin/navigation", "icon": "Link", "id": "e494"},
    {"key": "roles", "title": "角色管理", "path": "/admin/roles", "icon": "UserFilled", "id": "cb50"},
    {"key": "users", "title": "用户管理", "path": "/admin/users", "icon": "User", "id": "a1ad"},

import json
import urllib.request

# Get current admin role
req = urllib.request.Request\("http://localhost:3001/roles/1"\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
    role = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)

# Add menuManage to menuKeys if not exists
if 'menuManage' not in role['menuKeys']:
    role['menuKeys'].append\('menuManage'\)

url = "http://localhost:3001/roles/1"
data = json.dumps\(role\).encode\(\)
put_req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PUT'\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(put_req\) as r:
        print\(f'Updated admin role with menuManage'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import urllib.request

# Get all menus
req = urllib.request.Request\("http://localhost:3001/menus"\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as resp:
    menus = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)

# Define sort order
sort_order = {
    'dashboard': 1,
    'home': 2,
    'articles': 3,
    'navigation': 4,
    'agents': 5,
    'packages': 6,
    'features': 7,
    'memberManage': 8,
    'subscriptions': 9,
    'roles': 10,
    'menuManage': 11,
    'users': 12
}

for menu in menus:
    key = menu.get\('key'\)
    if key in sort_order:
        menu['sort'] = sort_order[key]
        url = f"http://localhost:3001/menus/{menu['id']}"
        data = json.dumps\(menu\).encode\(\)
        put_req = urllib.request.Request\(url, data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='PUT'\)
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen\(put_req\) as r:
                print\(f'Updated sort for {menu["title"]}: {sort_order[key]}'\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'Error updating {menu["title"]}: {e}'\)
EOF)
